chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3419 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Nazir report dated 08.08.2014. 2. For hearing of CMA No.17134/2014. 3. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Aga Zafar Ahmed, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Jawed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel states that provisional assessment has been made hereunder and it may be just and proper to direct the respondents to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Counsel for the respondents have not cavil to the aforesaid. Petition is disposed of in the said terms. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
